transcript.text:
Everyone has heard about this restaurant before
Cooked in charcoal grill So the smokiness is there
Everything is out
Tasty
Why haven't I been here before?
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat gopchang (pork/beef small intestines)
Everyone has heard about this place That's how famous it is
They cook the meat in charcoal grill So it's very smokey
[Welcome Tzuyang]
This is Gopbuni Gopchang It's my first time here
Let's head inside
[Gopbuni Gopchang]
[Gopbuni welcomes you]
Hello
[So sweet]

Flowers...
Thank you
It kinda smells like gopchang
[Not edible]
They have pork belly and cartilages too
What's the most popular?
Our charcoal-grilled gopchang
As for the skillet, the soondae (pork blood sausages)
Well then the charcoal-grilled pork belly,
Charcoal-grilled gopchang
Charcoal-grilled makchang (abomasum) Salt and teriyaki
Cartilages
Stir-fried soondae 2 orders of everything
-That's a total of 12 servings, is that okay? -Yes
Also the tuna mayo rice balls
This is for about 13 people

I don't think she can finish everything
Salt makchang, teriyaki makchang, charcoal-grilled gopchang
Cartilages, pork belly,
Soondae gopchang
We made the tuna mayo rice balls for you
Thank you These are pretty
Everything is out now
Looks great Bon appetit
I love pork makchang
It's been a while
Looks very appetizing
Intestines tend to be served a little messy
But the visuals are nice
The interior is very trendy too
Really pretty
Let's give it a try

Gopchang first
Without any sauce
Already...?
Excuse me,
Thank you The steamed egg looks delicious
[Plum juice on the house]
-Heart-shaped ice cubes -Really?
Thank you
What? Heart ice
I'm touched
Let's try it
It does not smell at all
It's really hard to get rid of the intestine smell even with the sauce
This does not have that
The smokiness is very strong
She's pretty

Right? She's skinny too
Cute
I can hear everything from here
Make a wrap here
What is this?
This is cute Is it a bear?
[You're cuter!]
[Almost like a fan-meet]
[Plum juice]
Thank you
Thank you
Her face is so small
[After some photos]
[My fans are the best!]
Mayonnaise
Put this on top

Chives here
It's really good
1 last bite of this I can't stop
So soft and tender
Salt makchang
I'm a makchang fanatic
Both beef and pork
Pork is the best
Yummy!
Why haven't I been here before?
Ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
Really good
Next
Teriyaki
This can't go wrong
I'm so happy It's been so long

How is it this soft?
Yum
These are perfect for those who can't eat intestines because of the smell
This one is the pork belly
This is nice
You can have everything together Although I would order them separately
It's good that you get to taste everything
The smokiness...
Really good
Cartilages now
This is just what I like
Chunky pieces too
The ratio is perfect
Soondae gopchang
This is the only pan-fried dish here
This has its pros

Pan-fried gopchang
And no gamey smell
This is like the very standard gopchang
An addicting taste You would crave soju with it
Glass noodles are a must here
Steamed egg
Let's eat now
You can add toppings
Adding cheese on the cartilages would be nice
[On the fire]
Can I add snow cheese on here?
Yes, certainly
Please
The visuals are amazing
Cheese cartilage
So good

It's 1.5 times better
Rice balls are a must too
This is the chang combo
Gopchang, makchang
So tasty
You know it's going to be a good meal when you first taste the gopchang and it does not have a gamey taste
If it smells, people don't crave it after
But if you start with something like this,
You'll be alright
-I'll re-heat this for you -Yes, thank you
Teriyaki makchang
This is delicious too I love it
The teriyaki sauce and the mayo go really well together
It looks like new
Yes, we made a new one
Let's eat it again

Hot!
With glass noodles
There's a lot of soondae
This might take me a minute to finish So I'll focus on eating now
Some gopchang first
Personally, I think it goes really well with mayo
Gopchang is a perfect dish for some alcochol
Gopchang explosive
Cooked crispy is good too
Enough for just the outside to get crispy
How can intestines not have a gamey taste?
Not at all
I think it's because of the charcoal grill
The smokiness is really strong
Let's reheat these and put the corn on the side
[Let's change the grills]

Cartilages
Their cartilages are great too
Rice ball to pair with this
It's perfect with some rice
Or even with some alcohol
The quote... "I'm for you, gopchang is for gopbuni"
What's gopbuni?
Pretty? Gopchang is pretty
A mix of gopchang and the word "pretty"
I see
1 bite
This is the soondae gopchang
This is that... What was it again?
Plain? I don't remember
Standard?
I love the meat-veggie ratio

They don't overload it with veggies
Bunch of onions, carrots,
[I hate it]
It says they have fried rice
It should be great here
Can I get cheese flying fish roe fried rice?
Isn't that too much cheese?
This is about right
It's so cheesy
Look delicious Mix up all the cheese
Cheese fried rice
Getting the fried rice is a must So good
The explosion of the roe
Tasty
Mix it up like this? Yum
Mix with corn

The fact that she actually eats that much
I get full after 1 serving
We serve big portions
They do give you a lot of food
Really cost-efficient because it's fully packed
All of our customers are surprised by the serving portion
A lot of gopchang too
You might think it's not that much at first
But it's a lot of food
The scorched egg on the bottom is good too
The bottom is too burnt
Let's not eat the burnt parts
I had the fried rice as well
You should definitely get the fried rice here
As for the teriyaki, it wasn't spicy so it's perfect to get for the kids
Charcoal-grilled gopchang is perfect to have as a couple or even with friends and family to pair with some alcohol

Thanks everyone
[She's about to leave...] Hold on a minute
This is a Chuseok gift for you (Korean Holiday)
Chuseok?
This is a gift set from our restaurant that we sell
That's cool Gopchang as a gift
[Left with a warm heart and hands full of gifts] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
